name: multi-send-skill
description: Agent-Native Batched ERC20 Transfers on X Layer

scripts.setup: npm run compile && npm run deploy
scripts.check-deps: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('node_modules')) { console.error('❌ node_modules missing. RUN: npm install'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dev: npm run check-deps && tsx watch server/index.ts
scripts.deploy: npm run check-deps && hardhat run deploy/deploy.ts
